meta.description: Volteroom — quality and style united in every product. New-generation designer switches, sockets and frames in five finishes.

common.currencyNote: Prices are indicative; content is placeholder.

hero.title: Quality and style, united in every product
hero.subtitle: Minimalist design taken to perfection — switches, sockets and frames for both classic and modern spaces.

gallery.title: Product presentation
gallery.subtitle: Discover the concept, features and technical details of the new generation.

collections.title: Product categories
collections.subtitle: One mechanism type, endless design possibilities.

finishes.title: Five finishes for covers and frames
finishes.subtitle: A tactile surface texture and monolithic form for a flawless look.

features.title: Features of the new generation
features.subtitle: Selected details, reliable mechanisms and a five-year warranty.

items.title: Monolithic form
items.desc: No dividers between covers and minimal gaps between frames and panels.

items.title: 9.5 mm frame width
items.desc: Universal 1–5 gang frames with precise alignment.

items.title: Reliable mechanisms
items.desc: Silver-nickel alloy contacts and screw contacts on every socket.

items.title: 5-year warranty
items.desc: Selected materials and a glass-filled polyamide 66 frame.

addressCta.title: Visit our showroom
addressCta.subtitle: Come and see the collection in person — we'll help you choose.

switchShowcase.title: Built for everyday touch
switchShowcase.subtitle: Three reasons our large-button switches feel different — in how they look, how they press, and how they last.

items.title: Stylish, modern design
items.caption: Large buttons and the absence of partitions between the mechanisms in the multi-gang frames create a cutting-edge and sophisticated look.

items.title: Comfort
items.caption: Large buttons are very easy to press, even without focusing on them, and their innovative soft-touch surface provides a unique tactile experience.

items.title: Durability and reliability
items.caption: Switches with large buttons require minimal effort to operate, extending the lifespan of their mechanisms.

catalog.title: Catalogue
catalog.subtitle: Mechanisms, covers and frames — switches, sockets, dimmers and data outlets in five finishes.
catalog.empty: No products match the selected filters.

product.orderSeparatelyMechanism: This is the internal mechanism — colour-independent. Order the matching cover or button and a frame in your chosen finish separately.
product.orderSeparatelyCover: Supplied in the finish of your choice. It fits the matching mechanism; order a frame separately.
product.orderSeparatelyFrame: Choose the size and finish. The mechanism and its cover are ordered separately.
product.priceNote: Indicative price. Mechanism, cover and frame are sold separately.
product.frameNotIncluded: The frame is not included in the product kit and must be purchased separately.

basket.title: Basket
basket.note: Online payment is not available yet. To order, contact us or visit our showroom.

about.title: About Volteroom
about.intro: VOLTEROOM is a European brand of high-quality electrical installation products. Our specialists have many years of experience in engineering supplies for civil and residential construction.
about.mission: We help create modern technical solutions for spaces that shape image, emphasise status, increase the market value of real estate, and create an atmosphere and warm emotional perception.
about.product: A wide selection of mechanisms, fashionable colours, a complex yet practical texture with a soft-touch finish across all series, high-quality materials and geometric shapes allow us to bring any design idea to life.
about.productLeadIn: Our range includes all the necessary mechanisms to fully equip any space, regardless of its complexity:
about.productBalance: We strive for the perfect balance of beauty, affordability and functionality.
about.quality: We provide a 5-year warranty and comprehensive service throughout the entire lifespan of our products. High-quality components and modern technologies allow our products to last for decades without loss of quality.
about.closing: VOLTEROOM is an investment in the aesthetics, functionality and reputation of a property.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Visit us or send a message — we're happy to help.
